headline: OSI Systems, Amphenol, and Zebra Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed more than 300 points and briefly touched a fresh all-time high above 50,700 as market sentiment improved amid falling yields.

headline: Is Amphenol (APH) Quietly Redefining Its AI Edge Through Expanded Beam Optical Standards?
summary: Earlier in May 2026, 3M announced that it and a group of technology companies, including Amphenol, had formed a new multi-source agreement to develop open, interoperable expanded beam optical connector specifications for AI data center infrastructure. This collaboration could be important for Amphenol because it helps shape emerging standards in high-density AI optical connectivity, an area closely tied to its advanced interconnect offerings. Next, we'll examine how Amphenol's role in...
